name: @platform/env
description: Typed environment-variable loaders for the Fanaa Platform AI Studio (PLATFORM.md §13–§14). Validates DB / R2 / Studio-runtime env values with Zod and exposes per-context loaders (studio, worker, storage). Throws structured errors with a stable `env_invalid:<field>` marker so containers fail fast on misconfiguration instead of going live with NaN / undefined.
